title: Rain Against the Window
content: Heavy rain struck the apartment windows while Olivia sat alone on the sofa wrapped in a blanket. The weather had forced the city into a slower rhythm that evening. Cars moved carefully through wet streets below, their headlights reflecting softly against the pavement. Inside the apartment, warm light and quiet music created a peaceful contrast to the storm outside. Olivia spent hours reading, thinking, and occasionally staring at the rain sliding down the glass. There was something deeply comforting about remaining indoors while the world outside seemed cold and distant. Moments like that reminded her how small forms of comfort often became the most meaningful parts of ordinary life.
